notes: Live Modal H100 H1 embedded vLLM run using LMCacheConnectorV1 via --kv-transfer-config.
PROMETHEUS_MULTIPROC_DIR was shared across vLLM API and engine processes so embedded lmcache:* metrics appeared in vLLM /metrics.
Fixture includes metrics, command/env proof, compat/coverage reports, diagnosis, and parsed log evidence only; raw engine logs and traffic prompts are excluded.
H1 fixture is accepted, but score points remain gated on H2/H3 per SDLC 195 advanced-lane rung.
